description: Version manifest for all governance templates and framework core files. Used by SETUP --upgrade to detect and apply template changes to materialized projects. v1.0.0: Inaugural Claude Code release — full platform migration from GitHub Copilot multi-agent architecture. v2.1.0: feat(EVOL-020) canonical RDR skill + IPP compliance enforcement hook — Factory-rdr/SKILL.md consolidates Recommendation → Decision → Ratification (fixes Registration drift); check-ipp-compliance.sh blocks first-write fully-formed governance artifacts on PreToolUse Write. v2.2.0: feat(EVOL-021) phase 1: Incremental Dev Plan foundations — BLUEPRINT emits new sidecar artifact increment_plan.md declaring vertical increments (each = 1 PR that leaves product 100% functional and production-deployable); new spec.feature frontmatter field slicing_strategy (incremental|monolithic) with default `incremental` and trivial-heuristic escape to `monolithic` (≤2 scenarios AND ≤3 contract operations AND scope ≠ full-stack); Increment Plan Generation sub-phase added to Factory-blueprint-design after Cross-Pollination, RDR-driven with ≥3 slicing alternatives; feature-flag-OFF merges explicitly disallowed as a deployability escape. v2.3.0: feat(EVOL-021) phase 2: CVP + IMPLEMENT + immutability enforcement — CVP gains 6 checks (0c increment_plan_presence, 13 increment_deployability, 14 increment_to_scenario_coverage, 15 increment_to_contract_coverage, 16 monolithic_heuristic, 17 increment_to_task); IMPLEMENT --plan gains Increment Plan Gate prerequisite + Strategy Branch (monolithic vs incremental body generation with [INC-N.A.M]/[INC-N.B.M]/[INC-N.C.M] task tagging) + Per-Increment Completion Gate; dev_plan_template.md frontmatter gains slicing_strategy + invalidated_increments + increments[] mirror; immutability_policy.md gains Per-Increment Immutability section with status lifecycle (DRAFT→READY→BUILDING→MERGED + INVALIDATED branch), Follow-up Increment Rule (additive, non-breaking), slicing-strategy flip rules, and check_increment_immutability enforcement function; increment_plan_template.md gains per-INC Status field + Per-Increment Status Lifecycle table + status-monotonicity invariant. v2.5.0: feat(EVOL-021) phase 4: coherence fixes + downstream-consumer alignment + pre-existing drift cleanup — 5 CRITICAL + 4 WARNING + 3 INFO/DOC fixes from the Phase 4 global coherence audit. IMPLEMENT --build gains Strategy-Aware Build Entry (determine_build_scope) + strategy-branching throughout Phase Loop, Completion Gate regex breakdown, REVIEW/SEC per-increment-phase verification, per-increment status transitions with plan-level aggregation, and increment-aware EXTRACT_PHASE in Pillar 3 resume logic. IPP gains increment_plan.md as a first-class tracked artefact (check-ipp-compliance.sh allowlist + Factory-incremental-persistence SKILL Pillar 2 table). CVP Check 0a now reads scope from increment_plan.md (closes cross-artefact drift). CVP Check 0c documents optional cascade/iteration fields to decouple Check 0c from cascade lifecycle. Downstream rules/branching.md gains § Per-Increment Branch Naming with concurrency + lifecycle + monolithic escape. increment_plan_template.md plan-level status enum clarified (DRAFT|APPROVED|INVALIDATED, disambiguated from per-increment 5-value enum) + § 3 documents frontend-only vacuous-pass as intentional. Threshold wording unified to 'contract operations' across template + branching SKILL. immutability_policy.md clarifies Phase 3 × per-increment interaction + Follow-up Increment Rule × Phase 4 QA-verify chain-lock. Template CLAUDE.md cites CVP Check IDs (0c, 13-17) verbatim. Author-guidance notes added to 6 downstream templates (gherkin scenarios, user_journey, user_journey.integration, test_plan, peer_review, design_template). setup_master_template.md gains default_slicing_strategy Discovery question. Stale manifest entry framework_core.rules/defect-prevention.md removed (the canonical entry lives in templates.rules/defect-prevention.md). validate-governance.sh now reports 0 violations AND 0 warnings. v2.4.0: feat(EVOL-021) phase 3: iteration cascade + branching + docs — Factory-iteration-model gains CASCADE_INCREMENT_INTERNAL function (selective per-increment invalidation: only increments whose scenarios_covered/contract_surface intersect the change flip to INVALIDATED; MERGED increments never invalidate — they cascade to a follow-up increment; BUILDING increments get pending_iteration with --pause requirement), wired into CASCADE_TRIGGERS for CODESIGN_REFINE_ITERATION + BLUEPRINT_SYNC_COMPLETE; Factory-branching-strategy gains § Per-Increment Branching with feature/{FEATURE_ID}-inc-N-{slug} naming, concurrency lock reuse (one increment branch per feature at a time), post-merge hook (BUILDING→MERGED + Merged at: stamp + next-increment readiness check), backward compat for monolithic; README.md gains § Incremental Dev Plan (Vertical Slicing) with 7-paragraph authoritative user-facing description + BLUEPRINT/IMPLEMENT command table updates; downstream CLAUDE.md template gains § Incremental Dev Plan (Vertical Slicing); framework-meta CLAUDE.md gains § Incremental Dev Plan (EVOL-021 — framework authorship view) with 6 lock-step invariants for framework editors.
upgrade_strategy: Smart Additive Merge — ALL files use the same unified strategy: format-aware structural diff → add new content only → resolve placeholders in additions → preserve all existing content. No separate Cat A/B/C upgrade paths.

content_types.universal: No placeholders. New structural additions are merged additively.
content_types.stack_configured: Contains {{PLACEHOLDER}} tokens. New sections/fields are added, placeholders resolved via Smart Discovery + RDR.
content_types.project_data: Project-specific values. New fields/sections added with defaults, existing values never modified.

2.3.0: feat(EVOL-021) phase 3: new CASCADE_INCREMENT_INTERNAL function for per-increment selective invalidation. Reads docs/spec/{FEATURE_ID}/increment_plan.md § 1 increments, computes overlap of each increment's scenarios_covered/contract_surface with the change's affected_scenarios/affected_contract_ops, and transitions status per-increment according to immutability policy: MERGED never invalidates (surfaces a follow-up-increment recommendation instead), BUILDING receives pending_iteration + --pause requirement (preserves in-flight work), {DRAFT, READY, INVALIDATED} flip to INVALIDATED with invalidated_by_iteration + invalidated_reason stamps. Plan-level status flips to INVALIDATED only when every non-MERGED increment is invalidated. Mirrors invalidated_increments[] into dev_plan.md frontmatter. Wired into CASCADE_TRIGGERS for ON_CODESIGN_REFINE_ITERATION and ON_BLUEPRINT_SYNC_COMPLETE; ON_IMPLEMENT_SYNC_COMPLETE explicitly SKIPS (implementation-only changes do not invalidate increment scope). Orthogonal to CASCADE_PENDING_ITERATION (plan-level cross-artefact) and CASCADE_SLICE_PEERS (cross-feature within a label-driven slice).

2.2.0: feat(EVOL-019) phase 3: new CASCADE_TRIGGER ON_BLUEPRINT_CONTRACT_CHANGE + new function CASCADE_CONSUMERS(upstream_feature_id, ...).
